jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Babyoye - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Babyoye. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Babyoye:
Babyoye is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Babyoye!
